package.name: nav_frontier_go2w_bridge
package.description: Bridge that translates /cmd_vel (geometry_msgs/Twist) into unitree_api/Request messages on /api/sport/request at a configurable rate (default 50 Hz). Performs safety clamping on linear/angular velocities, applies a watchdog that emits StopMove on /cmd_vel silence, and supports a dry-run mode for safe bring-up.
